name: Easy Risotto with Asparagus
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Roasted red bell peppers (from 7.25 oz jar)
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt margarine in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add onion and cook until tender. Stir in rice and 1 can of the broth. Bring to a boil. Reduce heat to medium and simmer, stirring frequently, for 8 to 10 minutes or until liquid is absorbed.
2. Add roasted bell peppers and asparagus; mix well. Cook an additional 15 to 17 minutes or until rice is tender, stirring frequently and adding additional broth about 1/4 cup at a time as necessary (there may be a small amount of broth left). Stir in cheese.
Nutrition Information Per Serving:
300 Calories, 8 g Fat, 1240 mg Sodium
